testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › User ID-based hash grouping
testcase.name: should consistently assign the same user to the same group

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › User ID-based hash grouping
testcase.name: should distribute users across rollout percentage

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › A/B test variant assignment
testcase.name: should assign users to variants consistently

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › A/B test variant assignment
testcase.name: should distribute users across variants

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › A/B test variant assignment
testcase.name: should return null for users not in rollout

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › A/B test variant assignment
testcase.name: should return null for disabled flags

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › A/B test metrics collection
testcase.name: should track impression metrics

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › A/B test metrics collection
testcase.name: should track interaction metrics

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › A/B test metrics collection
testcase.name: should track conversion metrics

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › A/B test metrics collection
testcase.name: should aggregate metrics across multiple users

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › A/B test metrics collection
testcase.name: should clear metrics when requested

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › Rollout percentage logic
testcase.name: should respect 0% rollout

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › Rollout percentage logic
testcase.name: should respect 100% rollout

testcase.classname: FeatureFlagsService - A/B Testing › Rollout percentage logic
testcase.name: should reject invalid rollout percentages
